title: 終わらぬ祭りを御覧じろ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One has been invited to a press conference
alongside Oguri Cap and Super Creek, and I
accompany them.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
All three of you have had historic success this
year. How does it feel to be called the Eternal
Top Three?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I feel like it came outta nowhere, so my gasts
were flabbered at first, but it actually feels pretty
nice to have such a cool title!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm gonna work hard to live up to it...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Nah, that's not right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna blow everyone's expectations so far away, that title'll have to work hard to live up to me!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! What a statement! Super Creek, Oguri
Cap, may I ask you two the same thing?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
How do you feel about being dubbed a part of
the Eternal Top Three?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's an honor to be given such a marvelous title,
but I also consider it a reminder for us not to be
content with our current standing.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
I see! So you wish to perform in a way that
exceeds your title, just like Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel like I deserve to be called one of the
Top Three.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Actually, I feel the same way Oguri does.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: And why is that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
We still haven't won against Inari. We lost at the
Mainichi Okan, the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As well as at the Japan Cup and the Arima Kinen.
Inari won all of those races. Given that...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
We can't consider ourselves the "Top Three." Not
when Inari is clearly the strongest among us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's why the two of us would like to issue a
declaration here today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inari, we're going to beat you next time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
We'll prove we're worthy to be part of the Top
Three.

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: W-wow! The competition between you three hasn't cooled down in the slightest! I can practically feel the sparks flying!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri and Creek, you two really are the best!
Things'd be way too borin' without the both of ya
keepin' me on my toes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I'm gonna let ya steal the win that
easily, though! I'll lay my title on the line and tear
up the track like I always do!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a new festival awaits the three of us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And to quote a dear friend, "You can't put on a
festival alone."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Inari? ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, everyone! You'd better share this next
part far and wide, so the whole world knows!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Our festival here is not over yet! In fact, brace
yourselves, 'cause we're just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the electrifying press conference
comes to an end. Everyone appears excited to
see what the three of them have in store next!
